query:
INSERT INTO newsletters ( subject, headline, bodyHtml, tennisTip, mentalTip, winnerSpotlight, programScheduleHtml, status, isAutoGenerated ) VALUES ( '🎾 RI Tennis Academy is Back — All Programs Start March 16!', 'Spring Season Starts March 16 — All Programs Returning!', '

Dear RI Tennis Academy family,

We are thrilled to announce that all programs are officially returning on Monday, March 16! Whether you are a junior player, an adult looking to sharpen your game, or someone working on the mental side of tennis, we have something for you this spring.

This season Coach Mario has exciting new drills, updated curriculum for the Junior Program, and fresh 105 Game Clinic slots added to the schedule. We cannot wait to see you back on the court!

Spots are limited — book your session now at tennispro-kzzfscru.manus.space/book

See you on the court!
Coach Mario Llano
RI Tennis Academy

', 'Focus on your first-strike tennis this spring. When returning serve, step into the court and take the ball early — this puts your opponent on the defensive immediately. Practice hitting your return at the peak of the bounce rather than letting it drop. A confident, aggressive return sets the tone for the entire point.', 'The biggest opponent you face is not across the net — it is the voice inside your head. This spring, practice the "Delete Fear" mindset: when a negative thought enters your mind, consciously say "delete" and replace it with a specific, positive action cue like "stay low" or "watch the ball." You cannot control outcomes, but you can always control your next action.', NULL, NULL, 'draft', FALSE );
